speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho gaya hai
text: Subah se mere haath-paanv thande pad gaye hain. Main bas dukan ke counter pe baith kar ro raha tha. Pata nahi aaj achanak kya ho raha hai, mera dimaag bilkul blank ho gaya hai, bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe andar tak duba raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the overwhelming feeling of panic without looking for a cause yet.
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise achanak se darr ka ek bohot bada toofan aap par haavi ho gaya hai, jiski wajah se aap theek se saans bhi nahi le paa rahe...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho gaya hai
text: Main hamesha apne level pe sab sambhal leta hoon, duniya janti hai yeh baat. Par aaj himmat puri tarah toot rahi hai. Pata nahi kya karoon, dimaag bilkul blank ho gaya hai mera.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the contrast between his usual long-term strength and this sudden breakdown.
text: Jo insaan salon se har mushkil akele hi sambhalta aaya ho, uske liye achanak aaj is tarah khud ko bebush mehsoos karna bohot hi zyada dara dene wala anubhav hoga...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki aaj subah mobile pe EMI bounce ka message dekha. Biwi ke hospital bills ne pichle mahine achanak se saari savings wipe out kar di thi... ab kal kya hoga mujhe nahi pata.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the relational weight of his wife's illness adding to the financial burden.
text: Apni patni ki bimari aur unki fikar ke saath-saath bank ki is pareshani ko akele jhelna aapko poori tarah tod raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho gaya hai
text: Log kya kahenge ki 50 saal ki umar mein main apni family ko support nahi kar paa raha? Mard hokar aise dukan pe rona mujhe shobha nahi deta, par dimaag bilkul blank ho gaya hai aaj.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responding to stigma cue with a shorter restatement and soft pause to normalize his emotion.
text: Is umar mein aur ghar ka mukhiya hone ke naate, aapko lagta hai ki aapko kamzor padne ka hak nahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul sahi kahan. Par abhi sab andar se khokhla lag raha hai. Savings gayab hain aur bank walo ke phone aana shuru ho jayenge. Bahut darr lag raha hai aage ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the feared consequence of the impending bank calls.
text: Abhi sabse zyada ghabrahat is aane wale waqt ki ho rahi hai ki jab recovery walon ke calls aayenge, toh bahar logon ko kya jawab dena padega...

speaker: Seeker
text: Izzat hi toh kamayi hai poori zindagi iss market mein. Agar padosi dukandaron ko pata chala ki main apni EMI nahi de paa raha, toh kal ko koi aade waqt mein udhaar tak nahi dega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Inviting deeper disclosure after two consecutive restatements.
text: Jab aap sochte hain ki poori market ko is mushkil ke baare mein pata chal jayega, toh us waqt aapke dil mein kya chal raha hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Us waqt ghutan hoti hai jaisi abhi ho rahi hai. Lagta hai itne saalon ki mehnat mitti mein mil gayi. Biwi ko toh bata bhi nahi sakta, uski tabiyat aur kharab ho jayegi tension lene se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the specific emotional exhaustion and isolation he feels due to his roles.
text: Lagta hai aap andar hi andar is dabaav se poori tarah thak chuke hain, aur parivaar ko bachane ke chakkar mein aap poori tarah akele is bojh ko dhone ko majboor hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho gaya hai
text: Shayad haan, main waqayi bohot thak gaya hoon. Har roz naya jugad sochna, kahin na kahin se paise arrange karna. Aur aaj toh dimaag bilkul blank ho gaya hai, chal hi nahi raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the structural stress of being a sole breadwinner facing a medical emergency.
text: Yeh thakawat aur poori tarah toot jana bilkul jayaz hai. Ek breadwinner hone ka pressure aur uske upar achanak medical emergency ke kharche, yeh kisi ko bhi tod sakte hain; aapki niyat saaf hai, bas sthiti bohot kathin hai abhi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho gaya hai
text: Aapne theek samjha meri baat ko. Par sach kahun toh abhi bhi aage ka rasta nahi dikh raha. Loan restructure karwane ka sochta hoon par samajh nahi aata pehla kadam kya loon, kyunki dimaag bilkul blank ho gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the financial impact of medical crises in his specific community context.
text: Aksar dukandaron aur apna business karne walon ki zindagi mein aisi medical emergencies aati hain jahan saari jodi hui jama-punji wipe out ho jati hai—yeh sirf aapke saath nahi ho raha, par market mein koi doosre ko batata nahi kyunki izzat ka darr hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai, koi apna asli dard nahi dikhata. Sab bas shaan dikhate hain. Mujhe batao main ab kya karoon? Theek hona chahta hoon aur bank ke calls aane se pehle kuch action lena chahta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering practical, low-barrier steps without adding new major obligations.
text: Is sthiti ko thoda sambhalne ke liye hum do chote kadam le sakte hain. Pehla, bank manager ko call karke sachai bata dena ki medical crisis chal raha hai aur thoda samay maangna. Ya dusra, apne CA ya kisi bharosemand dukan wale dost se sirf basic salah lena. Abhi ke liye kya theek lagta hai aapko?

speaker: Seeker
text: Dost ko batana toh sahi nahi hoga abhi. Bank manager ko main thoda bahut personally janta hoon. Shayad usko sidha call karke time maangna behtar rahega, par main usko bolun kya samajh nahi aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking the chosen suggestion into small, manageable steps.
text: Pehle ek do gehri saans lijiye shanti se. Phir unhe call mila kar bas itna bataiye ki ghar mein achanak medical emergency aayi thi jiski wajah se is mahine thodi dikkat hui hai. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye, restructure ki details baad mein bhi baat ki ja sakti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, sirf itna hi bataunga ki wife pichle hafte hospital mein admit thi, isliye savings khatam ho gayi. Details nahi dunga abhi. Yeh thoda aasan aur izzat wala lag raha hai. Kya wo meri baat manege?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing bank protocols to reframe the stressor as systemic rather than personal.
text: Bank walo ke paas aisi unexpected medical emergencies ke liye alag se protocols hote hain, yeh unke liye naya scene nahi hai. Jab aap samne se khud phone karke sach batate hain, toh unhe bharosa hota hai ki aap defaulter nahi hain, aur apni zimmedari se peeche nahi hat rahe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki is baat se kafi tasalli mil rahi hai mujhe. Kam se kam lagta hai ki agar main khud aage badhkar theek se bata dunga toh wo log gunde ya agent nahi bhejenge dukan par recovery ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational aspect of his relief regarding social standing.
text: Aapko sabse zyada shanti tabhi milti hai jab aapko yeh yakin hota hai ki aapke parivaar ki aur dukan ki barson ki kamayi izzat par koi daag nahi lagega...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho gaya hai
text: Bilkool, izzat aur naam hi to bachana hai. Biwi ne waise hi hospital mein bahut dard jhela hai, main ghar par weak nahi padna chahta tha. Bas aaj subah wo panic haavi ho gaya aur dimaag bilkul blank ho gaya tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting his duty-bound nature to remain strong for his wife.
text: Unke aage hamesha strong bane rehna aap apna sabse bada farz samajhte hain, aur isiliye apne andar ke darr aur fikr ko hamesha chipa kar rakhte hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Pati hone ke naate yeh meri duty toh hai hi. Par sach kahun, ab thoda lag raha hai ki main bank wale issue ko sambhal lunga. Ek baar wo sambhal gaya toh aadhi tension wahi khatam ho jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming his proactive approach despite the significant stress.
text: Aapne itne bhaari dabav mein bhi halaat ka mukabla karne ka faisla kiya, yeh apne aap mein aapki badi samajhdari aur tajurbe ko dikhata hai; sach mein ek bar bank mein baat ho jaye toh rasta aasan ho jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main abhi aadh ghante mein dukan badha kar khud branch hi chala jata hoon. Phone se zyada face-to-face ja kar unhe bharosa dilana zyada sahi rahega is waqt.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Checking in on his emotional state after making an action plan.
text: Saamne baith kar unse apni pareshani poore atmavishwas ke sath rakhne ka yeh sochna, aapko andar se is waqt kaisa mehsoos karwa raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Abhi thoda situation control mein lag raha hai. Subah jab message aya tha tab toh mere haath-paanv hi kaanp rahe the, par ab lagta hai ki problem hai toh face toh karna hi padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift from helplessness to taking charge.
text: Subah ki us lachari aur hadbadahat ki jagah, ab lagta hai ek nayi himmat jag rahi hai, jahan aap is sthiti ki baag-dor wapas apne hathon mein lene lage hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bharosa toh karna hi padega khud pe. Do bacchon ki school fees bhi aage bharni hai. Ek baar ye hospital aur medicine ka phase nikal jaye, toh phirse main raat-din ek kar dunga dukan ke kaam par.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring his readiness to resume his duty fully.
text: Ek baar bas yeh bura waqt nikal jaye, toh aap phir se apne bacchon ke future aur ghar ke liye dugni mehnat karne ko puri tarah taiyar baithe hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho gaya hai
text: Bilkul. Maine apni duty se aaj tak muh nahi moda, ab bhi nahi piche hatunga. Bas wo subah ka jo shock tha usne dara diya tha, jisse dimaag bilkul blank ho gaya hai jaisa feel hua tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the momentary nature of the shock he experienced.
text: Wo achanak se aya hua panic ka jhatka vakayi bohot gehra tha, jiske liye aap bilkul taiyar nahi the aur usne kuch palon ke liye apko rokk sa diya tha...

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukar hai maine apse apne man ki ye saari ghutan nikal li. Kafi halka mehsoos ho raha hai ab. Aisa lag raha hai ki seene se bhot bada bhoj utar gaya ho aur rasta dikh gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing by acknowledging his progress and reinforcing his capable nature.
text: Mujhe khushi hai ki baat karke aapko sukoon mila aur aapko ek disha nazar aayi. Bank mein branch manager se baat karne ke liye aapko meri taraf se dher saari shubhkaamnayein, aap sach mein bohot mehanti aur jimmedar insan hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Pata nahi kya ho raha hai aaj kal... hisaab milane baithta hoon toh mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai. Aisa lagta hai jaise andar se ek ajeeb sa darr lag raha hai, ghutan ho rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the overwhelming inner panic and blankness using Lens F to validate the emotional flood.
text: Aap keh rahe hain ki andar se ek bohot ajeeb si ghabrahat ho rahi hai, aur ekdum blank feel ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Haan... raat ko theek se neend bhi nahi aati. Aisa lagta hai ki situation haath se nikal rahi hai aur main kuch manage nahi kar pa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the duty burden using Lens B to acknowledge the weight of being the sole responsible person.
text: Sabki zimmedariyan nibhane ka bojh itna zyada ho gaya hai ki aapko bahut bebasi aur ghutan mehsoos ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Kyunki main ek family head hoon. Agar meri management aise hi fail hoti rahi, toh ghar ka kya hoga? Log kya kahenge jab unhe meri asliyat pata chalegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the feared consequence using Lens E to softly name the implied fear of losing respect.
text: Aapko is baat ka sabse bada darr hai ki agar aapki is thakan ka bahar kisi ko pata chala, toh log aapke parivaar par sawal uthayenge.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Sahi baat hai. Asal mein pichle mahine EMI bounce ho gayi meri. Bank ka notification dekh kar dukan ka hisaab bilkul bigad gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asked a question to gently explore the connection between the revealed stressor and the feeling of numbness.
text: Pichle kuch dino se jabse yeh bank ka chakkar shuru hua hai, kya tabhi se yeh ghabrahat aur badh gayi hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Haan. Sach kahun toh hospital ka karz chukane ke liye maine dukan ka stock aur jo bacha-kucha sona tha sab bech diya tha. Ab mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational sacrifice using Lens C to acknowledge the deep loss incurred for the family.
text: Aapne apno ki jaan bachane ke liye apna aakhri bacha hua sahara bhi daaw par laga diya.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Kya karta us waqt? Par ab khud ke paas kuch nahi bacha. Sharam aati hai khud par ki main ek accha future nahi de pa raha unhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the duration of carrying this burden alone using Lens D.
text: Kaafi samay se aap yeh sharam aur apni nakaami ka aehsaas bina kisi se baante seh rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Roz subah dukan jata hoon, dimaag bilkul sunn hota hai... par wahan jaakar dikhawa karna padta hai ki sab theek chal raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asked a question to explore how they manage the emotional masking while at work.
text: Dukan mein poora din jab dimaag sunn mehsoos hota hai, tab us ghabrahat ko aap kis tarah sambhalte hain wahan akele?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Bas chup chap baitha rehta hoon dukan mein. Andar hi andar itni ghutan hoti hai par chehre par kisi ko dikhne nahi deta ki meri halat kya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the core exhaustion arising from maintaining the duty-based facade (C5 + Duty_Based logic).
text: Lagta hai roz roz yeh jhoothi himmat dikhate dikhate aap poori tarah se thak chuke hain, physically aur mentally dono tarah se.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Bahut thak gaya hoon yaar. Kabhi kabhi sach bolu toh lagta hai sab chhod ke kahin door chala jaun... par phir parivaar ka chehra yaad aata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handled the moderate risk flag with a short restatement (Lens E) and safety check.
text: Apne parivaar ko sochte hi, shayad isi thakan ke beech bhi aapko wapas lautna padta hai. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Haan theek hoon, fikar mat kijiye. Aisa kuch galat kadam nahi uthaunga, aakhir main hi toh akela kamane wala hoon. Bas pareshan hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided a warm normalising line for the mild risk, then affirmed the structural difficulty of being a family head handling medical debt.
text: Aise waqt mein pareshan hona bilkul swabhavik hai. Ek family head hone ke naate, akele itna bada medical kharcha aur dukan dono dekhna aasan nahi hai, aur yeh thakan bilkul natural hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Par hamare yahan mard agar complain kare toh log kya bolenge? Yeh izzat ka sawal hai, sab akele hi manage karna padta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handled stigma cue with a shorter restatement (Lens C) ending in a soft pause.
text: Izzat bachane ke chakkar mein shayad aapko lag raha hai ki aap apni pareshani kisi se bhi baant nahi sakte...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Kaise baantoon? Agar kisiko pata chala ki bank ka loan nahi chuka pa raha toh izzat mitti mein mil jayegi. Usi darr se mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used a brief systemic anecdote to normalise the silence of breadwinners in middle-class society.
text: Main samajh sakta hoon ki yeh kitna bhari hai. Parivaar ka bojh uthane walo mein akele sab kuch chupchap sehna bahut common hai—sirf aap nahi, balki kai log 'log kya kahenge' is darr se kisi se zikr nahi karte.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Shayad aap theek keh rahe hain ki aur log bhi is darr mein jeete honge. Par main aage badhna chahta hoon, theek hona chahta hoon, koi raasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offered 2 manageable logistical suggestions suitable for a P9 breadwinner facing debt.
text: Yeh bahut acchi baat hai ki aap aage ka soch rahe hain. Abhi thoda bojh halka karne ke liye, kya hum bank manager se loan restructuring ki baat soch sakte hain, ya phir pehle ghar mein kisi ek vishwas wale insaan se chinta share karna theek lagega?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Ghar pe toh bilkul nahi. Bank manager wala option thoda practical lag raha hai, par abhi himmat thodi kam lag rahi hai wahan jane ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Broke down the bank manager option into a single, low-stakes step for today.
text: Koi baat nahi, ekdum se sab nahi karna hai. Pehle aaj sirf dukan par rakhe loan ke zaroori papers ek folder mein jama kar lijiye... phir kal manager se milne ka sochenge... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Haan, papers toh dukan ke locker mein hi hain. Unko ek jagah rakhna main aaj aaram se kar sakta hoon. Dimaag thoda light lag raha hai yeh soch kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided a systemic reframe to normalise financial crises caused by medical emergencies.
text: Jab hum EMI aur interest ke jaal mein phaste hain toh system ka pressure aksar panic badha deta hai. Yeh aapki failure nahi, balki ek aam financial crisis hai jo medical expense ke baad kai logo ko jhelna padta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Bilkul sahi baat hai. Interest par interest lag raha hai, middle class ka aadmi kya karega. Ek hospital ka bill poori saving kha gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the role of the provider having to restart from zero using Lens B.
text: Ek emergency aate hi saari zindagi ki mehnat bikhar gayi, aur ab aapko ek head of the family ke roop mein dobara shoonya se ladna pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Zero se hi shuru kiya tha jawaani mein bhi. Thodi takleef hogi, par itna experience toh hai dukan chalane ka, sambhal lunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the historical strength using Lens D to focus on the time and experience gained.
text: Aapko yaad aa raha hai ki pichle itne saalo mein aapne khud ke dum par business banaya tha, aur woh tajurba ab bhi aapke paas hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirmed the Seeker's resilience as a family provider separating his worth from the financial loss.
text: Yeh dekh kar khushi ho rahi hai ki aap phir se apna confidence dhoondh pa rahe hain. Ek pita aur pati ke roop mein aapne humesha apno ki raksha ki hai, aur yeh kadam bhi usi himmat ka pramaan hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Arre haan, roz waise bhi bagal wale tapri se chai peeta hi hoon. Aaj thoda bina tension liye piyunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the feeling of regained calm using Lens F to close the interaction.

coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feeling quality of the emotion flood without rushing to the problem
text: Andar itna zyada bojh aur andhera mehsoos ho raha hai ki sab kuch ruk sa gaya hai, aur aansu roke nahi ruk rahe.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha
text: Haan, sach mein. Aisa lag raha hai ki sab kuch mere hathon se nikal gaya hai. Jab main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha, toh aisa laga jaise ab aage badhne ki koi taqat hi nahi bachi mere andar. Poora blank ho gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of losing all strength to move forward
text: Aisa lag raha jaise ab aage ke raaste poori tarah band ho chuke hain aur aakhiri himmat bhi toot chuki hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha
text: Raasta band hi ho gaya hai. Ek medical expense spiral ne humein road par la diya hai. Pichle mahine hospital ka bhari bill diya aur aaj mere business loan ki kist bounce ho gayi. Uske baad se hi main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time sequence of consecutive financial shocks
text: Itne lagatar kharchon ke baad jab aaj achanak EMI bounce ka jhatka laga, toh usne andar tak jhinjhod kar shant kar diya.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Invite deeper reflection on the relational and duty impact of the father's lost savings
text: Apne pitaji ki saari jama poonji is tarah kharch ho jane ka ehsaas tumhare mann par is waqt kaisa bojh daal raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha
text: Bohot guilt hota hai. Ek bada beta hone ke naate mujhe unko aaram dena tha, par meri wajah se unko is umar mein karz dekhna pad raha hai. Main poori tarah fail ho gaya hoon. Biradari aur gaon mein hamari izzat mitti mein mil gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirror the stigma of lost respect with a shorter phrase and soft pause
text: Parivaar ke samne khud ko zimmedar aur izzatdar sabit na kar paane ka darr bohot thess pahuncha raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha
text: Bohot bhaari darr hai. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab kuch khatam karke aaram mil jayega is daily ke tension aur karz se. Par phir mere kisan baap ka chehra yaad aata hai ki wo akele kaise sambhalenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Implement moderate risk protocol, hold phase until safe
text: Aise mushkil halaat mein aisi thakawat aana aur sab chhod dene ka khayal aana samajh aata hai, par yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha
text: Haan, main kuch galat nahi karunga, aap daro mat. Pitaji ne pehle hi bohot jhela hai, main unhe aur dukh nahi de sakta. Bas ye udhaari aur kist bounce ka pressure rula raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the deep exhaustion and helplessness hidden under the sequential emotion flood
text: Lagta hai ki is lagatar debt spiral aur parivaar ki ummeedon ko poora karne ki koshish mein andar se ek bohot gahri thakawat aur lachari aa gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha
text: Haan, bilkul yahi baat hai. Ek deep exhaustion hai. Maine apni taraf se poori koshish ki thi is business ko bachane ki, lekin ek baar medical expense shuru hue toh cycle ruka hi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the financial distress caused by medical bills in the urban/migrant context
text: Tumhara is qadar thaka hua aur helpless mehsoos karna ekdum normal hai. Aaj kal hamare sheharon mein medical bills kisi ki bhi saari savings aur business ko hila sakte hain, par is bimari aur karz ke bhanwar mein phansne ka matlab yeh nahi ki tum ek nakam bete ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha
text: Shayad aap sahi keh rahe ho. Par jab EMI bounce hoti hai na, toh bank wale logic nahi sunte, bas seedha attack karte hain. Main darr ke mare phone nahi utha raha. Ab kya karoon samajh nahi aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Use brief systemic anecdote to reduce shame and isolation around middle-class debt
text: Hamare yahan aam aadmi ke sath achanak aayi medical debt aur EMI bounce mein poori tarah akela pad jana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki izzat ka darr sabko khamosh rakhta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Izzat ka darr hi toh sabse zyada andar se kha raha hai. Par ab main hath pe hath rakh kar nahi baith sakta. Mujhe apne baap ke paise wapas laane hain aur business track pe lana hai. Batao kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe about banking systems to remove personal failure stigma
text: Ek baat samajhni zaroori hai ki EMI aur chit fund ka jo financial structure hota hai, wo medical emergencies ko dhyan mein rakh kar nahi banta; isliye uska bounce hona us system ka hissa hai, yeh tumhara personal failure nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha
text: Bank walo ko ye baat kaun samjhaye? Unki collection agent ki call aayi thi aaj subah, itni rukhi awaaz thi. Tabhi se mera BP badh gaya aur main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how the agent's tone threatened his sense of dignity and duty
text: Collection agent ki un karwi baaton ne seedha us zimmedari aur izzat wale hisse par waar kiya jise tum apni poori jaan laga kar bachana chahte the.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha
text: Bilkul! Main humesha loan time pe bharta tha, yeh meri life ka pehla bounce hai. Ab kya koi rasta hai in agents ke lagatar calls ko temporarily handle karne ka taaki main sukoon se soch sakun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2 simple, quick steps to regain control over phone calls
text: Do choti cheezein tum aaj try kar sakte ho: pehla, bank se aane wale unknown numbers ko aaj sham tak ke liye silent karna, aur doosra, jab bhi message aaye toh sirf ek fixed reply dena ki 'Main medical emergency mein hoon, branch aakar baat karunga'.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha
text: Silent karna theek rahega. Dimaag fटने se bach jayega. Par wo message set karne ke liye bhi phone kholna padega aur WhatsApp/SMS pe unke purane notice dekh ke thodi ghabrahat hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through one suggestion step-by-step to bypass the anxiety of opening the phone
text: Pehle phone ki settings mein jakar direct 'Do Not Disturb' ya silent on kar do… phir bas notifications swipe away kar do bina padhe… bas itna hi aaj ke liye, aur kuch nahi karna hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha
text: Okay, maine abhi silent pe dal diya aur screen ulti karke table pe rakh di. Ek choti si rahat mehsoos ho rahi hai, kam se kam achanak se aane wali ringtone ka darr kam hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the immediate somatic relief from the feared consequence of a phone ring
text: Wo jo har ring pe dil baith jata tha ki fir se koi taana milega, us ring tone ke darr se thodi shanti milni shuru hui hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha
text: Haan. Jab main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha tha, tab wo ring hi mere dimaag par hathode maar rahi thi. Ab branch visit ki baat dimag mein aa rahi hai. Kya sach mein manager meri baat sunega?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe the banking system to show restructuring is a standard right, not begging
text: Zadatar banks mein legitimate EMI bounce hone par hardship protocols hote hain jahan manager ko sachchi situation samjha kar ek restructuring manga ja sakta hai, yeh unka standard legal process hota hai aur bheek nahi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha
text: Accha, ye mujhe pata nahi tha. Mujhe lagta tha wahan ja kar manager ke saamne hath jodne padenge aur wo sabke saamne branch mein meri beizzati kar dega jaise gaon ke sahukar karte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the cultural relation frame connecting modern banks to village moneylenders
text: Banker aur customer ke beech ke rishte ko sahukar jaisa samajhne ki wajah se beizzati aur apmaan hone ka purana darr wapas aa gaya tha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha
text: Sahi baat hai. Akhir unhone mujhe ek legitimate customer samajh ke hi loan diya tha. Medical emergency toh kisi ki family ko bhi hit kar sakti hai. Ab main branch ja kar formally baat karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his shift in perspective and commitment to his duties
text: Is halaat mein bhi apne parivaar ke liye apni is ladai ko professional tareeke se ladne ki samajh dikhana sach mein kabil-e-tareef hai, aur yeh batata hai ki tumhari neeyat bilkul saaf hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha
text: Shukriya. Main sach mein poora toot gaya tha aaj, bas ek andhera lag raha tha. Par ab phone silent hone ke baad dimaag thoda theek se aage ki soch paa raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Anchor the Seeker to a resilient thought for future stressful encounters
text: Kal jab tum branch ke manager se milne jaoge, toh wahan poore aatmvishwas ke sath baithne ke liye apne aap ko sabse pehle kya yaad dilaoge?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha
text: Yahi yaad dilaunga ki main koi jaan-boojh kar default karne wala nahi hoon, bas ek beta hoon jisne medical emergency mein paise lagaye. Aur EMI restructure karke main rasta nikal lunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his embraced role as a responsible son
text: Ek zimmedar bete hone ki apni asliyat ko bina kisi sharam ke apnate hue, tumne ab poore bharose ke sath agla kadam uthane ki taiyari kar li hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha
text: Haan, bilkul. Ab main rone aur sunn padne mein time waste nahi karunga. Saans bhi theek se le paa raha hoon aur rasta thoda saaf dikh raha hai. Mujh par bharosa dikhane ke liye shukriya dost.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final reinforcement of resilience separated from outcome
text: Tumhara yeh naya aatmvishwas aur shanti dekh kar mujhe bahut khushi mil rahi hai, ek itne andhere aur mushkil daur se lad kar apne andar ki taqat ko dubara dhoond nikalna sach mein bemisaal hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag sunn ho chuka hai aur ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Pata nahi kya ho raha hai aaj. Main wahi ghar ke aangan mein baith gaya hoon, aur dimaag sunn ho chuka hai. Ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai jisme main khota ja raha hoon. Bacchon ne pucha kya hua, par mujhse unse baat bhi nahi kari ja rahi. Bas khali lag raha hai sab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalise the overwhelming response (mild risk protocol) and mirror feeling quality for Sequential coping.
text: Aise waqt mein sab kuch achanak thehar jana bahut swabhavik hai. Aapke shabdon se lag raha hai ki ek ajeeb sa bhari-pan aur khali-pan dono ek sath aapko gher rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ekdum sunn. Itne saalon ki mehnat lagti hai izzat banate banate, aur jab waqt palatta hai toh sab hath se phisal raha hota hai. Maine hamesha sab sambhalne ki koshish ki, par ab kuch nahi sujhta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty and role the Seeker usually holds.
text: Aapne zindagi bhar sabka dhyan rakha aur sab sambhalne ka jo bojh uthaya hai, lagta hai ki is mushkil waqt mein wo zimmedari aapko aur jyada thaka rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Jab pichle mahine achanak hospital jana pada tha, tab laga tha sab manage ho jayega. Par ab bas wahi ICU ke bills dimaag mein ghoom rahe hain raat din. Jo kuch bachaya tha, sab chala gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about the impact of this newly revealed stressor on their present state.
text: Din raat un aspatal ke parchiyon aur kharchon ka dimaag mein ghoomna, is sabne is waqt aapki neend aur sukoon par kaisa asar dala hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sukoon toh bacha hi nahi. Aaj bank se call aaya ki loan default ho gaya hai. Zillat mehsoos ho rahi hai, aur main koi backup plan ya financial help nahi soch sakta. Ye baat ghar mein kisi ko nahi pata.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the implied fear of the consequence of the loan default.
text: Bina kisi aarthik sahare ke aur bank ke is dabaav ke beech, yeh sochna ki aage ghar ka kharch kaise chalega aapko bahut dara raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dar ye hai ki parivar kya sochega jab sach samne aayega. Main is ghar ka breadwinner hoon. Zindagi bhar kamaya taki inko kabhi kisi ke aage hath na failana pade, par ab main poori tarah fail ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma cue about feeling like a failure with a short, soft pause restatement.
text: Ghar ka mukhiya hone ke naate, kisi ke aage hath failane ya nakamyab dikhne ka khayal hi aapko andar se tod raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Bacchon se aankh nahi mila pa raha. Wo mujhse puchte hain ki papa sab theek toh hai, main bas 'sab sambhal lenge' bol kar taal deta hoon. Ye bojh ab aur nahi uthaya jata.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the deep exhaustion stemming from the duty-bound masking of financial distress.
text: Lagta hai ki is 'sab sambhal lenge' wale bharose ka mukhota pehne hue, aap andar hi andar is paise ki pareshani aur zillat ke darr se poori tarah thak chuke hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai ab toh
text: Thak gaya hoon aur ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai ab toh mere dimaag mein. Rishtedaro ko bataunga toh unhe bas tamasha milega. Jab jeb khali hoti hai toh biradari bhi kinara kar leti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the exhaustion and normalise feeling isolated in this cultural context.
text: Is samaj mein ek ghar ke mukhiya se hamesha mazboot rehne ki umeed ki jati hai, isliye paise ki dikkat mein akele pad jana aur sharm mehsoos karna aam hai; aapka yahan thak jana bilkul jayaz hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag sunn ho chuka hai soch soch kar
text: Aap sahi keh rahe ho. Dimaag sunn ho chuka hai soch soch kar. Agle mahine ki bank EMI kahan se aayegi, agar recovery wale ghar aa gaye toh aangan mein tamasha banega meri barson ki izzat ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote to normalise the fear of losing respect over sudden financial debt.
text: Ghar chalane wale logon mein achanak aayi aarthik pareshani se aisi sharm aur izzat jane ka darr aana bahut common hai — sirf aapka nahi, lekin koi ispe bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein izzat ka darr sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Izzat hi toh kamai thi bas. Par bank wale do minute mein utaar dete hain. Main to hamesha imaan se chala, bimari mein mera kya dosh tha jo meri aisi halat ho gayi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the sense of unfairness regarding his honest efforts versus fate.
text: Aapne hamesha imaandari se apne parivar ka dhyan rakha, aur uske baad bhi jab bimari ne sab chheen liya toh ab ye mehsus hota hai ki kismat ne aapke sath na-insaafi ki hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Na-insaafi hui hai bilkul. Pehle bimari ne sara paisa khaa liya, aur ab ye bank loan. Par bacchon ke chehre dekhta hoon toh lagta hai inko is aanch se aur is zillat se kaise bachaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about the internal conflict regarding protecting his children.
text: Un masoom bacchon ki taraf dekh kar aapke andar unhe is karz ki pareshaani se mehfooz rakhne ke liye kis tarah ki kashmakash chalti rehti hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Har waqt yahi kashmakash rehti hai ki kahin inki aage ki padhai na ruk jaye. Main khana kam kha lunga, par inke samne ye loan default ya ICU ke bills ka zikr bhi nahi aane dena chahta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Short restatement ending in a soft pause for the stigma cue (secrecy due to shame).
text: Aap khud har takleef aur bhookh sehna chahte hain taki bacchon ke samne is pareshani ki parchaayi bhi na aane paye...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag sunn ho chuka hai
text: Par haqeeqat ye hai ki dimaag sunn ho chuka hai. Akela aadmi kab tak jhelega ye sab. Koi aisi financial help ka raasta bhi nahi dikh raha jo aage lu. Ab aap hi batao main kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalise the structural impact of sudden medical emergencies on family finances.
text: Jab medical emergency aati hai, toh acche se acche parivaron ka aarthik hisaab bigad jata hai, yeh kisi ki vyaktigat nakami nahi balki ek aisi majboori hoti hai jo achanak aati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye majboori toh hai, par aage ka kya? Bank ka call phir aayega aur main wahi aangan mein baitha rahunga. Koi raasta hai kya is se nikalne ka bina izzat gavaye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide realistic, manageable options to address the bank issue without losing face.
text: Kya aap kal subah un bank walo ko phone kar ke apni medical sthiti ke baare mein thoda waqt mangna chahenge, ya fir kisi purane dost se milkar in bills par baat karna chahenge?

speaker: Seeker
text: Dost ke aage izzat kharab nahi karunga abhi. Shayad bank walo ko call karke bol saku ki hospital ke chalte default hua aur thoda time de dein. Par unse baat kaise karun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk him step by step through preparing for the call.
text: Pehle aap apni bimari aur ICU ke discharge paper ek jagah rakh lijiye… phir subah bank ke customer care ko phone lagaiye… bas itna hi aaj ke liye try karna hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata tha dimag mein
text: Paper toh mere paas hi pahuche hue hain. Customer care ko phone lagana shayad thik rahega, recovery wale direct ghar nahi aayenge is tarah. Ek gehra sannata tha dimag mein, ab thoda dheela hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his action of facing the fear.
text: Pichle kuch dino se jo aangan mein tamashe ka ek dar aapko roke hue tha, aaj aap us dar ka samna karke bank ko sach batane ka ek chota kadam utha rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kadam toh uthana padega bank ki taraf. Bacchon ki taraf dekhta hoon toh sochta hoon main unka hero hoon, 'sab sambhal lenge' bolta hoon toh wakai me aage aakar sambhalna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore how this hero identity supports his resilience.
text: Jab aap khud ko unki nazron mein ek mazboot hero mante hain, toh wo ehsaas aapko is loan ke dabav mein aage badhne ki kitni himmat deta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat wahin se toh aati hai. Unke bhavishya ke liye hi to pichle itne saal se mehnat kar raha hoon. Ye zillat wala waqt bhi nikal hi jayega, bas rasta dhoondhna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the new resolve to protect his family.
text: Is faisle se ab aapko thoda hausla mil raha hai ki agar aap aise hi himmat rakhenge toh aapka parivar aur unki padhai is karz ke toofan se bachi rahegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur chup rehne se toh ICU ke bills clear honge nahi. Main bank ko call karke bolunga ki mujhe loan restructure ka option de dein, medical dikkat thi isliye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide structural information on loan restructuring rules during medical emergencies.
text: Reserve Bank ke niyam ke anusar medical emergencies ya achanak aayi pareshani mein bank loan ki EMI ko restructure karne ya thodi mohlat dene ka pravdhan rakhte hain, ye poori tarah kanooni hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag sunn hone ki bajaye
text: Asliyat mein aisa niyam hai? Ye mujhe bilkul nahi pata tha. Main darr raha tha ki wo seedha ghar se saman nikalenge. Ye jaan kar dimaag sunn hone ki bajaye thoda relax ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his relief regarding the legal safety net.
text: In niyamon ke bare mein jaankar aapko ek badi rahat mili hai ki bank walo ke sath baatcheet karke mamla suljhaya ja sakta hai bina kisi tamashe ya zillat ke.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, sabse bada darr wahi tamashe ka tha jo mere aangan mein hota. Agar waqt mil gaya, toh main double mehnat karke sab chuka dunga. Aapne sahi waqt par mujhe aage badhne ki umeed di.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close by affirming his journey from numbness to taking active steps.
text: In thodi der ki baatcheet mein aapne us gahre aur sunn andhere se nikal kar khud ke liye aur apne parivar ki aage ki zindagi ke liye ek sahi raasta dhoondh liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai
text: Mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai, bas main bilkul breakdown kar gaya hoon aur dimaag blank hai. Is emotional flooding mein mujhe kuch bhi sujh nahi raha, bas rona aa raha hai aur darr lag raha hai ki poora parivaar bikhar jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the emotional flood and panic to validate the overwhelming sensation.
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise andar ek bahut bada tufaan aa gaya ho, jisme har cheez haath se phisal rahi hai aur andar bas tez ghutan aur rona jama ho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main hamesha 'sab sambhal lenge' bol kar chalne wala mard hoon, par aaj meri saans atak rahi hai. Pura ghar meri taraf dekhta hai har zaroorat ke liye aur main blank hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the role/duty of being the pillar of the family that is currently feeling crushed.
text: Sabse bade hone ke naate hamesha ek mazboot chhat ban kar khade rehne ki aadat rahi hai, aur aaj wahi zimmedari ka bojh sambhal nahi paane se saans ruki ruki lag rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai
text: Kyunki ab kuch bacha nahi hai. Bhai ke accident mein pichle mahine saari jama-poonji chali gayi, aur aaj phone par bank ka EMI bounce alert dekh kar mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the speed and sequence of back-to-back stressors creating this panic.
text: Pehle bhai ka accident aur usme paise jana, aur ab achanak se bank ka ye naya alert, sab kuch itni jaldi ek ke baad ek hua ki bilkul sochne ka waqt hi nahi mila.

speaker: Seeker
text: Gaon mein sahukaar ka karz pehle se tha hum par. Mujhe laga tha dhire dhire nikal dunga, par ab lagta hai biradari mein izzat mitti mein mil jayegi aur log nakam baap bol kar hasenge mujh par.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored softly with a pause to respect the stigma cue without adding new questions.
text: Logon ke samne apni izzat khone aur unke tano ka samna karne ka soch kar hi andar ek bhari darr sa baith gaya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breakdown
text: Bilkul baith gaya hai. Meri choti bachi hai, uske samne log tamasha karenge aur paise mangne aayenge toh wo kya sochegi? Yahi sab soch kar poora breakdown ho raha hai mera.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explored the deeper pain behind his fear of the daughter witnessing his financial struggle.
text: In saari zimmedariyon aur is ghabrahat ke beech, beti ko ek behtar zindagi dene ki aapki wo koshish kahan bikharti hui dikh rahi hai aapko?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag blank hai
text: Main poori tarah fail ho gaya hoon shayad. Din raat ek machine ki tarah khat-ta hoon ghar ke liye, phir bhi aaj jeb khali hai aur samajh nahi aa raha aage kya hoga, dimaag blank hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the core unexpressed feeling of exhaustion and helplessness under the duty frame.
text: Lagta hai ki din-raat bina ruke apne parivaar ke liye mehnat karne ke baad bhi, achanak aayi is nakami ne ek bahut gehri thakan aur bebasi bhar di hai aapme, jisme aage ka raasta andhera lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai
text: Thak toh sach mein gaya hoon. Kismat hi aisi hai ki jama-poonji ek jhatke mein hawa ho gayi. Main aaj raat biwi ko kya jawab dunga ghar jaa kar, wahi soch ke mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated his exhaustion as normal for breadwinners and separated his self-worth from the circumstantial financial loss.
text: Machine ki tarah bina ruke kaam karna aur parivaar ki khatir apna sab kuch jhonk dena koi mamooli baat nahi hai. Aapne jo thakan jheli hai wo bilkul sach hai, aur accident jaisi musibat mein paisa chala jana aapki koi galti ya nakami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par usne meri khatir apni maa ke diye hue aakhri gehne bhi mujhe de diye the hospital ke bill ke liye. Maine uska vishwas tod diya, bas yehi baat andar kha rahi hai mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used a systemic anecdote to normalize the silent suffering and heavy burden carried by men facing debt.
text: Ghar ke bade aadmiyon mein akele chupchap sab bojh uthana aur apni taqleef dabana bahut common hai—sirf aapka darr nahi hai, lekin koi mard bolega nahi kyunki samaj sikha deta hai ki sab khud sambhalna hai. Maine aise aur bhi log dekhe hain jahan is akelepan aur zimmedari ne insaan ko andar tak tod diya tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai, akele akele ek jung lad raha hoon main. Agar main kisi ko apni ghabrahat dikhaunga aur thoda bhi toot gaya, toh mera parivaar toh sach mein bikhar jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the deep relational pressure to not show any weakness to keep the family intact.
text: Aapko lagta hai ki aapke ghar ko aapas mein jode rakhne ki aakhri keemat aapki apni himmat hai, aur us himmat ko tootne ki koi ijazat nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai
text: Ekdum yahi darr tha. Par aaj sach mein himmat ne jawab de diya hai, EMI ka text dekhte hi dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya. Mujhe kuch bhi karke is darr se theek hona hai, koi raasta hai kya aage ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Suggested two actionable, low-effort steps to break the panic cycle.
text: Agar aap theek hona chahte hain, toh bina koi naya kaam uthaye do chote kadam le sakte hain. Pehla, abhi turant ek glass paani peekar 5 minute shanti se baithna, aur doosra jab theek lage tab bank ke manager se baat karne ka sochna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag blank hai
text: Bank wala kaam abhi mere dimaag mein nahi ghusegi, poori tarah dimaag blank hai us taraf sochne ke liye. Par paani peena shayad abhi mujhse aaram se ho payega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walked through the immediate grounding exercise step-by-step.
text: Bilkul, pehle yeh karo ki paas se ek glass thanda paani lao... phir usko dheere dheere ghoont karke piyo... aur aane wale 5 minute tak sahukaar ya EMI kisi ke baare mein kuch mat socho, bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, main aaram se paani peeta hoon. Sach bolu toh aaj subah jab wo bounce notification aaya toh mere hath achanak kanpne lag gaye the.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the physical shock of the notification to validate the panic.
text: Wo laal message dekh kar jaise ekdum se saans ruk si gayi ho, aur saari ghabrahat hath kanpne ke roop mein bahar aa gayi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, pichle ek mahine mein hospital ke chakkar ne bilkul nichod diya hai. Socha tha overtime karke thoda paise nikal lunga, par aam aadmi system mein bas pista hi rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalized the financial shock of medical emergencies as a structural issue rather than a personal failing.
text: Hamare system mein, khaskar middle-class pariwaaron mein, achanak aayi medical emergency ka poora wazan hamesha aam aadmi ki pocket par hi girta hai. Ye financial dhakka kisi ko bhi hila sakta hai, ye aapsi nakami nahi balki humari vyavastha ki kadi sachai hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sachai toh yahi hai. Sahukaar sirf apna byaaj dekhta hai aur bank apne rules. Kisi ko kya parwah ki kiska saga bhai maut ke muh mein tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the loneliness of facing cold institutional logic during a personal family tragedy.
text: Is aisi duniya mein jahan system aur log sirf paisa aur niyam dekhte hain, apni us gehhri takleef mein khud ko akela paana chubhta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Chubhta toh bahut hai. Par abhi paani peene se thodi dhadkan theek hui. Aur main ye soch raha hoon ki bhai ki jaan bach gayi wahi kaafi hai, jama-poonji hi thi na, aakhir me zindagi se badhkar thodi thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirmed his values and strength in prioritizing his brother's life over money.
text: Ye soch paana ki bhai ki jaan kisi bhi paise ya jama-poonji se badi thi, ye sach mein aapke andar ka ek bahut mazboot aur sacha hissa dikhata hai. Yahi pyaar aapko ek behtareen insaan banata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap sahi bol rahe hain. Paise jama-poonji toh main dobara kama lunga jaise tese, bhai nahi laya jata. Uske samne toh ek do EMI bounce hona shyd choti cheez hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored his reframing of the debt as manageable compared to family duty.
text: Pariwaar ke mukhiya ke roop mein aapne sabse zaroori chunao kiya — apne bhai ki zindagi ko bachana aapse bada farz tha, baaki kharche iske aage chote lagne lage hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haa mera bada farz wahi tha. Aurat ne bhi toh bina soche ek pal mein gehne de diye the, kyuki usko bhi mere upar aur mere bhai par poora vishwas tha. Wo sahi maine mein mere sath khadi rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the strong relational bond and trust between him and his wife.
text: Aapki biwi ka wo vishwas aur is mushkil ghadi mein bina kisi sawaal ke aapka sath dena ye batata hai ki aap dono ka rishta sach mein bahut mazboot hai aur aap akele nahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bas akele lade ja raha tha andar andar. Mujhe usko saari baat sach sachi bata deni chahiye ki bank wali problem aayi hai aaj.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explored how this decision to share the burden will impact his current level of fear.
text: Jab aap ye sochte hain ki aap dono is baare mein khul kar baat kar lenge, toh aapke andar chupa wo darr ab kaisa mehsus ho raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai
text: Darr kafi kam lag raha hai ab. Aadhe ghante pehle jab mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya tha, uske mukable toh main ab kafi shant hoon. Biwi ko bataunga toh aage ka rasta aur aasan hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirmed the courage required to open up to his wife, building confidence.
text: Ye faisla karna ki aap is karz ki samasya ko akele na jhel kar apni patni ke sath baatenge, bahut himmat ka kaam hai aur waqayi aage badhne ka bojh isse zaroor halka hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag blank hai
text: Aapka bahut bahut shukriya. Jis baat se dimaag blank tha aaj, wahi ek choti samasya lag rahi hai ab jisko solve kiya ja sakta hai. Sahukaar se main phir naye sire se baat karunga kal.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored his transition from complete panic to actionable, forward-looking readiness.
text: Thodi der pehle jahan sab kuch band aur khattam lag raha tha, wahan se sidha kal ki behtar tayari kar pana apne aap mein ek bahut achha aur bada badlao hai.
